# Virginia Laser Specialists

> Premier laser hair removal and CoolPeel CO₂ skin resurfacing clinic in Tysons / Vienna / McLean, Northern Virginia. Lutronic Clarity II dual-wavelength laser and Cartessa Tetra Pro CO₂ technology. Safe for all skin types. Call 703-752-6608.

Virginia Laser Specialists is a medical laser clinic located at 8100 Boone Blvd, Suite 270, Vienna, VA 22182. Services include laser hair removal (face, body, Brazilian, full body), CoolPeel CO₂ laser skin resurfacing, and DEKA Pulse deep CO₂ resurfacing. Free consultations available.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, technology, and clinic.
- [Laser Hair Removal](/laser-hair-removal): Permanent hair reduction with Lutronic Clarity II — pricing, treatment areas, aftercare.
- [CoolPeel CO₂ Laser (Tysons)](/coolpeel-co2-laser-tysons-va): CoolPeel CO₂ resurfacing landing page for the Tysons / Vienna / McLean area.
- [Laser Skin Resurfacing](/laser-skin-resurfacing): CoolPeel and DEKA Pulse CO₂ resurfacing — protocols, downtime, before & after.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Full price chart for all 28 treatment areas and resurfacing packages.
- [Specials](/specials): Current limited-time promotions.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Before-and-after results.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about safety, downtime, candidacy, and preparation.
- [About](/about): Clinic, team, and technology.
- [Contact](/contact): Location, hours, map, and contact form.
- [Book Free Consultation](/book-free-consultation): Schedule a complimentary consultation.
